title: elatostema burmanicum
intro: Elatostema burmanicum, also known as Burman's Polynesian Shield Fern, is a plant species in the family Urticaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elatostema burmanicum include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health issues.
